title: Context-Aware Data Loader from Lightning Record Page
overview: A #Data Loader is added to Account’s related Data List and configured to use $CONTEXT_RECORD_ID to reference the current Account record. After upload, the loaded records are automatically related to that $CONTEXT_RECORD_ID.
generalUseCase: Use #Data Loader with $CONTEXT_RECORD_ID in field mappings to enable context-aware uploads from a #Data List on any Lightning Record Page, so imported records automatically relate to the current record.
